name: No Signboard Holdings Ltd.
summary: No Signboard Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, manages and operates food and beverage outlets in Singapore. It operates a chain of restaurants under various F&B brands and concepts, including No Signboard Seafood, Hawker Asian Burger & Buns, Little Sheep Hot Pot, and Mom's Touch Korean Chicken & Burger. The company also produces, promotes, and distributes beer under the Draft Denmark brand, as well as is involved in the wholesale trade of liquor and soft drinks; and distributes various third party brands of beer, as well as operates as an OEM beer supplier for third party brands. In addition, it produces and distributes ready meals through a network of vending machines. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Singapore. No Signboard Holdings Ltd. is a subsidiary of GuGong Pte. Ltd.
